t_ch: 这就去办，知更鸟小姐。
t_en: Right away, Miss Robin.

t_ch: 请问……
t_en: Can I ask you something...

t_ch: 啊，您好，小姐——需要帮助吗？
t_en: Oh, greetings, miss. Is there anything I can help you with?

t_ch: 你知道「典当行」该怎么走么？
t_en: Do you know how to get to the pawnshop?

t_ch: 典当…噢，您想找的应该是「慈玉女士」的房间吧？听说她的确正在提供一些…特别的服务。
t_en: Pawnshop... Ah, you must be talking about Lady Bonajade's place, right? I heard she offers... special services there.

t_ch: 我把位置在您的设备上标记出来了，请查收。
t_en: I've marked the pawnshop's location on your device. Please feel free to check it out.

t_ch: （「慈玉女士」？似乎从谁那里听过这个名字…是银狼吗？）
t_en: (Lady Bonajade? I think I've heard that name somewhere before... Was it from Silver Wolf?)

t_ch: （说起来，她说要去碰碰天才俱乐部后就消失不见了，不知道还顺利吗。）
t_en: (Come to think of it, she disappeared after mentioning that she was going to meet with the Genius Society. I wonder how things turned out for her.)

t_ch: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
t_en: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

t_ch: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
t_en: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

t_ch: 欢迎光临「慈玉典押」，晖长石号分行。
t_en: Welcome to Bonajade Exchange, Radiant Feldspar Branch.

t_ch: 这位小姐，该如何称呼？
t_en: How should I address you, dear lady?

t_ch: 叫我「萨缪尔」就好。
t_en: Just call me Samuel.

t_ch: 萨缪尔，很好的名字呢。那么萨缪尔小姐，你想要什么？又愿意为之付出什么？
t_en: Samuel, nice name. So, what do you need, Miss Samuel? And what are you willing to give up in return?

t_ch: 我想活下去。为了这个愿望，我愿意押上自己的一切。
t_en: I want to keep on living. And for that, I'm willing to give up everything I have.

t_ch: 自己的一切？
t_en: Everything you have?

t_ch: 是的，一切。
t_en: That's right, everything.

t_ch: 萨缪尔小姐，请回吧。我想，你对「典押」的定义还不够了解。
t_en: Miss Samuel, I think you'd best turn around. It seems you're not quite familiar with the term "pawn."

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 就是字面意思。我能感受到你强烈的求生欲，它炽烈得像一团火焰；但与之相对的，你拿不出任何与它等价的押物。
t_en: I mean it literally. I sense your burning desire to live, but unfortunately, you don't have anything of equal value to offer.

t_ch: 呵…这样啊。
t_en: Heh...

t_ch: 果然，什么「通过抵押便能实现愿望的典当行」…只是故弄玄虚。
t_en: Okay, "A pawnshop that grants wishes"... I see. It's just a marketing gimmick.

t_ch: 很严厉的指控呢，你不理解也很正常。但没关系，我会帮你看清。
t_en: That's quite a harsh accusation. I understand you may not fully comprehend what I mean, but don't worry, I'll help you understand.

t_ch: 去找这几个人吧，他们都光顾过我的典押行。用你的眼睛去见证，看看他们的愿望有没有实现。
t_en: Go and talk to these people. They're all customers of my pawnshop. See for yourself if their wishes have come true.

t_ch: 然后，回到我这里来，我会让你理解「典押」意味着什么，也会让你明白自己还缺少什么。
t_en: Once you've done that, come back to me. I'll help you understand the true meaning of "pawn" and make you realize what you're missing.

t_ch: （与其说是典押行的老板娘，那位「慈玉女士」的气质…更像是一位放贷人呢。）
t_en: (That Lady Bonajade feels more like a... moneylender rather than the owner of a pawnshop.)

t_ch: （反正暂时没有别的事做，就照她说的四处看看吧。）
t_en: (Well, I've got nothing better to do anyway. I'll do as she says and see what happens.)

t_ch: 多萝西，我想送你一件礼物。你看。
t_en: I've prepared a gift for you, Dorothy. Check this out.

t_ch: 哇…好漂亮的项链！是猫眼石的吗？太美了……
t_en: Whoa... what a beautiful necklace! Is it made of cymophane? It's stunning...

t_ch: 你怎么知道我喜欢猫眼石的首饰？还是紫色色相，就像爸爸年轻时送给妈妈的那一串…我从没和别人谈起过这事，戴尔，你是怎么知道的？
t_en: How did you know I love jewelry made of cymophane? It has the same purple hue as the necklace my dad gave my mom... I've never told anyone about it. How did you find out, Dell?

t_ch: 那…那么……
t_en: So... so...

t_ch: 你愿意…愿意和我交往吗？
t_en: Will... will you go out with me?

t_ch: 我…愿意！
t_en: I... I will!

t_ch: 啊？！真、真的吗？
t_en: R—really!? I mean... really?

t_ch: 以前我没答应你，是因为我觉得你根本不知道我喜欢什么。但是这份礼物让我明白了…你其实一直在默默观察，尝试着去了解和我有关的一切…所以，我愿意。
t_en: I never said "yes" before because I thought you had no idea what I liked. But this gift made me realize you were actually paying attention all along, trying to learn everything about me... So, yes, I will.

t_ch: 太、太好了！我…我的愿望真的实现了！
t_en: W—Wonderful! My... my wish has actually come true!

t_ch: 多萝西，我们走吧？到外面去，一起看看十二时分的风景！
t_en: So, shall we go, Dorothy? Let's go outside and enjoy the stunning views of the Twelve Hours!

t_ch: 好，走吧！
t_en: Yeah, let's go!

t_ch: 哈哈哈！不自量力的小姑娘，又来给老子送钱啦？
t_en: Hahaha! You stupid little girl! Coming back to lose more money, huh?

t_ch: 废话少说，赶紧开始吧。
t_en: Enough talk. Let's get started.

t_ch: 一场定输赢…我和你赌我的全部家当！
t_en: This will be our final game... I'm betting my entire fortune!

t_ch: 嚯嚯，口气这么大？行啊，那就让我见识下你的本事！
t_en: Oh? A big talker, huh? Alright, let's see what you've got!

t_ch: 赢…赢了？我…我真的赢了？！
t_en: I... I won? I actually... won!?

t_ch: 这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
t_en: Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?

t_ch: 是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
t_en: It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...

t_ch: 哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
t_en: Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!

t_ch: 赢…赢了？我…我真的赢了？！
t_en: I... I won? I actually... won!?

t_ch: 这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
t_en: Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?

t_ch: 是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
t_en: It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...

t_ch: 哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
t_en: Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!

t_ch: 嗯…对，你没听错。我已经抓到他了。
t_en: Yeah... you heard right. I've got him.

t_ch: 他一直藏在匹诺康尼，「太阳的时刻」。他换了个身份，还混进折纸大学当了个教授。
t_en: He's been hiding at the Moment of Sol in Penacony, using a fake identity. And he even posed as a professor at Paperfold academy.

t_ch: 我和家族已经谈好了。引渡相关的工作就交给你们了。
t_en: I've made a deal with The Family. I'll leave the extradition-related paperwork to you.

t_ch: …怎么抓到他的？呵…有贵人相助。细节就别问了。
t_en: ...How did I find him? Well... let's just say I had some help from an influential figure. Don't ask for all the details.

t_ch: 二十二年啊…我追了他整整二十二年，跑遍了银河的每个角落。没想到最后会在这里，用这种方式……
t_en: Twenty-two years... Twenty-two years of chasing this guy all over the Cosmos. Y'know, never thought it'd end up like this, right here...

t_ch: 我先挂了，搭档…我要敬自己一杯。
t_en: I'm gonna hang up for now, partner... I need to raise a glass to myself.

t_ch: 沃克挂断了电话，他金属构成的深邃眼窝里渗出了一滴燃料…那是智械的泪水。
t_en: Walker hangs up the phone, and a drop of fuel seeped out from his deep, metal-constructed eye sockets... those were the tears of an Intellitron.

t_ch: （他们的愿望确实都成真了……）
t_en: (All of their wishes actually did come true...)

t_ch: （但我还是不太明白，她是怎么做到的，「典押」又意味着什么？回去问问吧……）
t_en: (But I just don't understand. How did she do it? And what does "pawn" really mean? I should go back and ask...)

t_ch: 你回来了，萨缪尔小姐。
t_en: So, you're back, Miss Samuel.

t_ch: 嗯，我找到了您说的那几个人。光顾了「慈玉典押」后，他们各自的愿望确实都成真了。
t_en: Yeah, I found those people, and it seems their wishes did come true after visiting the Bonajade Exchange.

t_ch: 但我还是不知道你想让我看清什么。他们看上去都那么的…圆满。
t_en: But I'm not sure what you want me to see. They all seem to be living... fulfilled lives.

t_ch: 别着急，这一步只是为了让你相信「慈玉典押」货真价实。接下来，我自然会告诉你他们付出的代价。
t_en: Not so fast. This step was just to show you that the Bonajade Exchange is genuine, that I had the power to grant their wishes. And now, I'll tell you the price they paid.

t_ch: 戴尔是个富家子弟，一路追求心仪的女孩多萝西而不得。为了俘获对方的芳心，他与我做了交易：抵押自己全部的财产，换取一样必定能打动多萝西的礼物。
t_en: Dell was from a wealthy family. He was head over heels for Dorothy and wanted to win her heart, so he made a deal with me. He put up his entire fortune in exchange for a gift that would impress Dorothy.

t_ch: 以公司的情报和人脉网络，这轻而易举。但戴尔很快就会因为支付不起客房费用被赶出梦境，那之后能否摆脱穷困潦倒的生活…就看他个人的努力了。
t_en: It was a piece of cake for me, thanks to my IPC connections. However, Dell will soon find himself evicted from the Dreamscape because he can't afford his room. Whether he can bounce back from poverty... well, that depends on him.

t_ch: 祝愿那串项链能让他们的感情永不破裂。
t_en: Let's just hope that necklace will keep their relationship from crumbling.

t_ch: 嗜赌成性的史黛西，她希望从我这里获得绝世的好运。但她没有任何可供抵押的财物，所以我收走了另一样东西：她所有的亲密关系。
t_en: Then there's Stacy, a lady with a gambling addiction. She wanted some serious luck, but she had nothing to offer, so I took something else instead. I took away all her close relationships.

t_ch: 从走出慈玉典押的那一刻起，星际中的每一间赌场都会记得她的名字，而父母手足会因此和她断绝往来，史黛西也不可能再交到真正的朋友。
t_en: From the moment she stepped out of the Bonajade Exchange, every casino in the cosmos would remember her name, but her parents and siblings would sever ties with her, and it would be impossible for Stacy to make any real friends again.

t_ch: 她会因「幸运」获得无穷的财富，却再也无法将那财富用在重要之人身上。
t_en: She will accrue a vast wealth due to her "good luck," but she'll never be able to use it for the people who truly matter to her.

t_ch: 至于沃克警探——他用了二十年的时间尝试抓捕一位罪大滔天的通缉犯，但始终踩不到对方的影子。彻底绝望之际，他找到了我。
t_en: As for Detective Walker, he spent two decades chasing down a wanted criminal for some heinous crime, but he never caught the guy. In his desperation, he came to me.

t_ch: 他的抵押物是自己的存储系统。很快，他作为「警探」的记忆就会被抹除，他会彻底忘记自己是谁，也不会记得自己曾经做出了什么样的牺牲。
t_en: He offered his own memory system as collateral. In due time, his memories as a detective will be erased, and he will completely forget his own identity and all the sacrifices he has made.

t_ch: 很有趣的现象，不是吗？我满足一些人的渴望，施与他们恩惠。而这恩惠很快又会回到我这里，伴随着更大的渴望。
t_en: Interesting, don't you think? I fulfill people's desires and grant them favors, and soon, they come back to me with even greater desires.

t_ch: 而当人们窥见他人的欲望得到满足时，自己也会产生同等的欲望，无穷无尽。最后，我就能从这片漩涡中捞起我想要的东西。
t_en: When people see others' desires get fulfilled, they develop their own desires. It seems like an endless cycle but it does have a goal. In the end, I will get what I desire from this whirlpool.

t_ch: 而我最擅长的事，恰巧就是等待。所以现在，你明白自己要付出什么了吗，萨缪尔小姐？还是说，我该称呼你为……
t_en: And patience happens to be one of my greatest strengths. So now, do you understand what you must give up, Miss Samuel? Or should I address you as...

t_ch: 格拉默铁骑的孑遗——「AR<unbreak>-26710</unbreak>」？
t_en: AR<unbreak>-26710</unbreak>, a remnant of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry?

t_ch: …毫不意外。
t_en: ...I'm not surprised.

t_ch: 你比我想象中镇定许多呢。失熵症…真是一场无妄之灾啊，不是么？
t_en: You are much calmer than I expected. Entropy Loss Syndrome... truly an unjust misfortune, isn't it?

t_ch: 格拉默人为了不让共和国最强大的武器落入他人手中，就在战士们的基因编译中设下了这么一道「保险」。
t_en: The higher-ups in Glamoth implemented such a "fail-safe" within the genes of their warriors, just to make sure the Republic's most powerful weapons wouldn't fall into the wrong hands.

t_ch: 而代价…因为这些铁骑从来没有被视作独立的「人」，自然也无代价而言。
t_en: As for the price... Those Iron Cavalries weren't exactly seen as regular, independent "humans," so there wasn't really a price to be paid.

t_ch: 可你不一样，如今的你是星核猎手，是「流萤」，一个鲜活的生命。你当然想活下去，但昔日的苍穹战线已经覆灭，知晓这一秘密并能治愈它的人，也不复存在了。
t_en: However, you are different. You're now a Stellaron Hunter, a living being named Firefly. Naturally, you want to continue your existence, but with the Firmament Front gone, the people who know the secret and can cure the disease are nowhere to be found.

t_ch: 你想说，公司有办法做到？
t_en: Are you suggesting that the IPC has a remedy?

t_ch: 不是没有希望，我只能言尽于此。
t_en: Well, there might be a silver lining. That's all I can say for now.

t_ch: 原来如此。难怪你会说我拿不出等价的抵押物，因为「我自己的一切」没有意义……
t_en: I see. It's no wonder you said I can't provide anything of equal value, because nothing I own holds any meaning...

t_ch: 你想要的，是我为了能够活下去，亲手给自己的伙伴们戴上镣铐。
t_en: So, you're going to ask me to personally restrain my partners to ensure my own survival.

t_ch: 很可惜，也不是这样。
t_en: Unfortunately, that's not quite the case.

t_ch: 「伙伴」，很不错的说法，这让我对星核猎手更加好奇，你们各自身份特殊，彼此间的联系也颇为有趣——它如此紧密、牢固，却又保持着个体的独立。
t_en: Partners... a nice way to put it. Now, I'm even more curious about the Stellaron Hunters. Each of you has your own identity and a special bond with each other. It's strong and intimate, and yet it allows for independence.

t_ch: 就像石心十人追随「钻石」，你们应当也有一位领袖。我好奇他是怎样的人，也好奇每一位星核猎手是否都像你一样……
t_en: Just as the Ten Stonehearts follow Diamond, you follow your own leader. I wonder what they are like, and if all Stellaron Hunters are like you...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>行于「终末」的命途，却奋力向命运的反方向前进？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Traveling on the Path of Finality but struggling against your destiny, attempting to move in the opposite direction?</color>

t_ch: 如果有机会，我希望你们都能来我的典当行坐坐。而为了这一天的到来，我愿意耐心等待。
t_en: I really hope that one day, all of you will come and visit my pawnshop. I'll be waiting patiently for that day.

t_ch: 我是否可以理解为，这是「钻石」瞒着公司，向星核猎手递出的一张邀请函？
t_en: Can I see this as an invitation from Diamond to the Stellaron Hunters while keeping the IPC in the dark?

t_ch: 如果可以，我更希望你把它当作我个人的行为，既不代表公司，也不代表战略投资部。
t_en: Consider it more of a personal offer from myself. It doesn't represent the IPC or the Strategic Investment Department.

t_ch: 星核猎手和公司打过许多交道，但「石心十人」…我们并无交集。你的提议我可以传达，但在那之前我有个疑问……
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters have interacted with the IPC, but not the Ten Stonehearts... Our paths have never crossed. As for your offer, I can pass it along to my partners, but I have a question...

t_ch: 你知道我的身份，那也一定能想到我的{RUBY_B#银狼}伙伴{RUBY_E#}很可能正在监视这个房间。只要她愿意，只需几秒，整个庇尔波因特都会看到这场会谈。
t_en: You know who I am, and you must know that my {RUBY_B#Silver Wolf}partner{RUBY_E#} is keeping an eye on this room. If she wanted to, she could let the entirety of Pier Point know about it within a few mere seconds.

t_ch: 是什么让你甘愿承受沦为弃子的风险，也要为「钻石」完成这一切？
t_en: What drives you to take such a risk and extend this invitation on behalf of Diamond, even if it could lead to your downfall?

t_ch: 因为，总得来说…我们是「同类」。
t_en: Simply put... you and I are the same.

t_ch: 但和星核猎手、星穹列车不同，我们聚集在一起…只是为了「各取所需」。
t_en: However, unlike you Stellaron Hunters or the Astral Express, we band together... merely to obtain what we want.

t_ch: 十人有各自的来路，也有各自的归宿。而在这其中一段路上，我们受到「钻石」邀请，与他同行。
t_en: Each of us has our own past and destined ends. And on this journey, we have been invited by Diamond to join him.

t_ch: 这段路可以很短，也可以很长。因为我们每人心中都有一片{RUBY_B#野心}空洞{RUBY_E#}，只有不断依赖外物填补。
t_en: This journey could be either brief or long, as each of us carries a {RUBY_B#ambition}void{RUBY_E#} in our hearts that can only be filled from the outside.

t_ch: 而「钻石」，他给出了承诺——将「存护」令使的大权一分为十，为那空洞添上「基石」。
t_en: So, Diamond made us a promise. To divide the power of the Emanator of Preservation into ten pieces and give each of us a Cornerstone to fill that void.

t_ch: 「血肉孱弱，而我心坚如辉石。若非如此，则『存护』之道无以立足。」
t_en: "Mortal flesh is fragile, yet my heart is unyielding like the monolith. For without this resolve, the way of Preservation would fade into oblivion."

t_ch: 所以明白了么？这不止是一句誓言，更是我等「十人」交出的抵押，我们由此换得机遇、财富、存续、明天……
t_en: So, you understand? This pledge goes beyond a mere oath. It's our collateral in exchange for opportunities, wealth, survival, and a future...

t_ch: 而它们再换得的一切，都会让「石心」变得更加坚不可摧，在终将到来的「列神之战」中，实现{RUBY_B#「钻石」}「存护」{RUBY_E#}的伟业。
t_en: And whatever we gain from it will fortify the Stonehearts in return, allowing us to achieve the great cause of {RUBY_B#Diamond}the Preservation{RUBY_E#} when the war among the Aeons eventually comes.

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 去吧，孩子，你不用立即给出答复。就像我说的，我最擅长的事，就是等待。
t_en: Take your time, child. You don't need to give me an immediate answer. Like I said, patience is one of my greatest strengths.

t_ch: 如果命运真的翻开了那一页，我们自然会再见的。
t_en: If fate turns that page, our paths will cross again.

t_ch: 但我很遗憾，这典当行给不了我想要的。我在匹诺康尼的最后一次尝试…也只能以「希望」作结。
t_en: It's a shame, though, that this pawnshop can't give me what I desire. My last attempt in Penacony... Well, it ends with "hope."

t_ch: 慈玉女士，我如约来交付抵押物了。
t_en: Lady Bonajade, I've come to deliver the collateral as promised.

t_ch: 能帮人实现愿望的当铺…
t_en: A pawnshop that grants wishes...?

t_ch: 听着离谱，不像真的。
t_en: Nah, sounds too good to be true.

t_ch: 如果要实现我的愿望……
t_en: If they can really grant my wish...

t_ch: 不知道要拿什么做抵押？
t_en: I wonder what they'll ask for in return?

t_ch: 要是我赢了……
t_en: If I win...

t_ch: 你的宝箱就归我了！
t_en: Your chest is mine!

t_ch: …谁说我要和你赌了？
t_en: ...Who said I was betting with you?

t_ch: 我说的！
t_en: I did!

t_ch: （真精神呀，还是和之前一样。）
t_en: (They are still a ball of fire as ever.)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

t_ch: 要是我赢了……
t_en: If I win...

t_ch: 你的宝箱就归我了！
t_en: Your chest is mine!

t_ch: …谁说我要和你赌了？
t_en: ...Who said I was betting with you?

t_ch: 我说的！
t_en: I did!

t_ch: 典当行你去过了吗？
t_en: Have you been to the pawnshop?

t_ch: 去过了。
t_en: Yeah, sure.

t_ch: 你当了什么？
t_en: What did you pawn?

t_ch: 什么都没当。
t_en: Nothing, actually.

t_ch: 那你干什么去了？
t_en: Then why did you go there?

t_ch: 去看那位「慈玉女士」。
t_en: Just to meet Lady Bonajade in person.

t_ch: …你们全都一个样！
t_en: ...Come on, you're all the same!

t_ch: 该打爆哪个呢？
t_en: Which one should I pop?

t_ch: 一二三四五……
t_en: One, two, three, four, five...

t_ch: 丹恒打虚卒……
t_en: Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...

t_ch: 别擅自改词。
t_en: Don't change the words.

t_ch: 欸，你看到了吗？
t_en: Hey, did you see that?

t_ch: 外面那个灰色头发的人……
t_en: The gray-haired one outside...

t_ch: 别瞎看，喝你的酒！
t_en: Don't look around! Just focus on your drink!

t_ch: 那人看着精神不太稳定…
t_en: Seriously, they look like a total lunatic...

t_ch: 啾啾，啾啾……
t_en: Chirp, chirp...

t_ch: 折纸鸟…小鸟鸟……
t_en: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

t_ch: 喂，我说你呀……
t_en: Come on...

t_ch: 快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
t_en: Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!

t_ch: 醒醒…醒醒……
t_en: Wake up... Wake up...

t_ch: …喂，{NICKNAME}！别睡啦，太阳晒屁股啦——
t_en: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!

t_ch: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？我听房间里一点动静都没有，快吓死了。
t_en: Are you okay? Can you hear me? I didn't hear a peep from your room, and it really freaked me out.

t_ch: 我这是在做梦吗？
t_en: Am I dreaming?

t_ch: 不是在做梦啦，这是在现实，「白日梦」酒店！「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
t_en: You're not dreaming. We're in The Reverie Hotel, in the real world. The Order's dream is over.

t_ch: 好熟悉的对话…
t_en: Woah, this conversation is such déjà vu...

t_ch: 你在说什么啊，别睡糊涂了吧…「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
t_en: What are you talking about? Are you still half-asleep or something...? The Order's dream is over.

t_ch: 小题大做了吧。
t_en: Stop making a big fuss.

t_ch: 你一直没反应，我担心还不行吗？幸好，「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
t_en: Hey, I was seriously worried when you didn't respond. Thank goodness. The Order's dream is over.

t_ch: 虽然已经过去一天了，但回想起来还是汗流浃背，列车的「开拓」之旅差点就要交代在这匹诺康尼了……
t_en: Even though it's been a day, I still break into a sweat when I think about it. Our Trailblazing expedition almost ended in Penacony...

t_ch: 你倒是心宽，还能呼呼大睡。我可是留下了心理阴影，昨晚连眼睛都不敢闭，生怕一睡着就再也醒不过来了。
t_en: I'm so jealous that you got a good night's sleep. I was traumatized and too scared to even close my eyes. I thought if I fell asleep, I'd never wake up again.

t_ch: 星核怎么样了？
t_en: What happened to the Stellaron?

t_ch: 其他人在哪里？
t_en: Where are the others?

t_ch: 他们已经出发了。只有善良的本姑娘特地来喊你起床，还不快说声谢谢。
t_en: They've already left, leaving this kindhearted girl to wake you up. You owe her big time.

t_ch: 会有黑眼圈的。
t_en: You'll have dark circles under your eyes.

t_ch: 本姑娘天生丽质，才不会有黑眼圈！
t_en: A natural beauty like me never has dark circles!

t_ch: 你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
t_en: The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.

t_ch: 家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
t_en: The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.

t_ch: 现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
t_en: Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.

t_ch: 现在就差你了，赶紧收拾收拾。准备好了，咱们就出发！
t_en: Everyone's waiting for you, so hurry up and pack. We're leaving as soon as you're ready!

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！两位聪明又美貌的女士，欢迎登上我的「晖长石号」！
t_en: Ohohohoho! Welcome aboard my ship, the Radiant Feldspar, smart and charming ladies!

t_ch: 快来，请坐！咱们可得好好聊聊！
t_en: Please, have a seat! Let's have a pleasant conversation!

t_ch: 要是我赢了……
t_en: If I win...

t_ch: 你的宝箱就归我了！
t_en: Your chest is mine!

t_ch: …谁说我要和你赌了？
t_en: ...Who said I was betting with you?

t_ch: 我说的！
t_en: I did!

t_ch: （真精神呀，还是和之前一样。）
t_en: (They are still a ball of fire as ever.)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)

t_ch: 该打爆哪个呢？
t_en: Which one should I pop?

t_ch: 一二三四五……
t_en: One, two, three, four, five...

t_ch: 丹恒打虚卒……
t_en: Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...

t_ch: 别擅自改词。
t_en: Don't change the words.

t_ch: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
t_en: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

t_ch: 啾啾，啾啾……
t_en: Chirp, chirp...

t_ch: 折纸鸟…小啾啾……
t_en: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

t_ch: 喂，我说你呀……
t_en: Come on...

t_ch: 快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
t_en: Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!

t_ch: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
t_en: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

t_ch: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
t_en: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

t_ch: 结果决定匹诺康尼未来的会议比想象中顺利好多…几乎没什么争论就结束了。
t_en: Turns out, the meeting to decide the future of Penacony went much smoother than expected... with little debate.

t_ch: 谐乐大典的开幕式应该快开始了，去现场看看吧。
t_en: The Charmony Festival's opening ceremony is starting soon. I should head down and take a look.

t_ch: …别忘了，我随时都可以一枪爱死你。
t_en: ...Remember, I can take you out with just one shot whenever I choose.

t_ch: 那可真是我的荣幸…放心吧，我最讨厌的就是在赌桌上出千。
t_en: That'd be my honor... Don't worry. I hate cheating at the table.

t_ch: 哼…你最好是。
t_en: Hmph... You better.

t_ch: 看看，这是谁来了？星穹列车的大英雄，全匹诺康尼如今最耀眼的{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
t_en: Look who's here! The great hero of the Astral Express, the most dazzling {NICKNAME} in all of Penacony!

t_ch: 哟，你也在这儿啊？好久不见，朋友。
t_en: Oh, you're here too? Long time no see, friend.

t_ch: 你们说什么悄悄话呢？
t_en: What are you guys whispering about?

t_ch: 你是不是见谁都一顿夸，砂金？
t_en: Do you always compliment everyone you meet, Aventurine?

t_ch: 只是寒暄的开场词而已，你我心照不宣就好。
t_en: Merely a greeting of platitudes. As long as you and I have an understanding.

t_ch: 怎么和公司站一边了，牛仔？
t_en: Why are you on the IPC's side now, cowboy?

t_ch: 这家伙…和我在追查的某个大可爱有关。那句话怎么说的来着？「敌人的敌人就是朋友」。
t_en: This fella... is also tracking down that son of a gun. What's that saying again? "The enemy of my enemy is my friend."

t_ch: 算了，上不得台面的事先放一边吧，别坏了谐乐大典的气氛。
t_en: Let's set aside those under-the-table dealings for now, pardner. Don't wanna spoil the festive mood of the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 我同意。那就让我们恭喜一下{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}吧。我听说家族要在谐乐大典上好好感谢你们列车组呢。哎，不能亲临现场真是太可惜了。
t_en: I agree. Now let's congratulate {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I hear The Family intends to thank the crew at the Charmony Festival. *sigh* It's a real pity I can't personally be there to witness this.

t_ch: 砂金，你退场退得还真匆忙。
t_en: You sure left in a hurry, Aventurine.

t_ch: 我的任务只是给公司入局撕开一道口子。别的不谈，就这件事而言，我自觉应该完成的还算不错。
t_en: My job was just to give the IPC an opening. Other things aside, I think I did a pretty good job at achieving this.

t_ch: 你们在流梦礁逗留的时候，其实我也就在附近。多亏有一位博学的朋友，不然我还真挖不到这么多黑料呢。
t_en: While you were at Dreamflux Reef, we were actually close by. We wouldn't have been able to dig up so much dirty information without the help of a knowledgeable friend.

t_ch: 就是那位令使有点用力过猛…我的身体支撑不了多久，否则这事还能结得更利落。
t_en: But that Emanator didn't pull any punches... My body couldn't hold out too long, otherwise this would have been settled in a much cleaner manner.

t_ch: 牛仔，感谢你们在决战里出手。
t_en: I'd like to thank you for all your help in the battle, cowboy.

t_ch: 哈，小意思。惩奸除恶可是头等大事，要是少了我们那才奇怪呢。
t_en: Hah, no problem. Punishing the wicked and eradicating evil is a top priority. Would've been strange if we sat it out.

t_ch: 先前来这么一下子，我们巡海游侠也算是再度出山了。你今后在路上估计能遇到不少「巡猎」的同志，拜托你替我问声好。
t_en: Makin' an entrance like that, us Galaxy Rangers are makin' a comeback. Reckon you'll meet quite a few followers of The Hunt on your journey, do me a favor and pass on my regards will you?

t_ch: 你们刚才到底在聊什么？
t_en: What were you guys chatting about?

t_ch: 算了，明人不说暗话，我直说了吧：我和一个叫{RUBY_B#「市场开拓部」主管}奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德{RUBY_E#}的高管有仇，而这个花枝招展的家伙能帮我找到他。
t_en: Forget it. I'm not one to beat around the bush. I've got a score to settle with a high-ranking executive fella named {RUBY_B#Head of Marketing Development}Oswaldo Schneider{RUBY_E#}. And this flamboyant fella here can help me find him.

t_ch: 市场开拓部和战略投资部的恩怨全银河皆知，但我还真没想到，连巡海游侠都有机会牵连其中。
t_en: The feud between the Marketing Development Department and the Strategic Investment Department is well-known across the cosmos. But what I didn't expect was the involvement of the Galaxy Rangers in this feud.

t_ch: 看来…事情要变得有意思起来了。
t_en: Looks like... things are about to get spicy.

t_ch: 祝你们在大典上玩得开心。
t_en: I hope you guys have fun at the festival.

t_ch: 多谢，也祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
t_en: Thank you, and I also hope you enjoy yourself, great hero of Penacony!

t_ch: 我就免了。不过，祝你玩得开心，不介意的话，回头我们再玩上两把。
t_en: I'll pass, but I do hope you guys have fun. If you don't mind, let's play a few rounds next time.

t_ch: 这种日子就该撒开了玩——祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
t_en: It's time to let down our hair and enjoy ourselves on days like this — I hope you can enjoy yourself to the fullest, oh, great hero of Penacony!

t_ch: 呀，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛？这才过了多久，我们又见面了。最近如何？
t_en: Well if it isn't {NICKNAME}? It hasn't been long, and yet here we are again. How are you?

t_ch: 哼唧…哼唧！
t_en: Oink... oink!

t_ch: 生活还是那么精彩。
t_en: Life is as wonderful as ever.

t_ch: 我想也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
t_en: Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

t_ch: 可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
t_en: Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.

t_ch: 累得够呛。
t_en: Dead tired.

t_ch: 哈哈，我猜也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
t_en: Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

t_ch: 可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
t_en: Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.

t_ch: 想跳槽了。
t_en: I'm in the mood for a job change.

t_ch: 嗯？这么直接，不怕我当真？
t_en: Hmm? So direct. Aren't you afraid I might take you seriously?

t_ch: 不过想想也是，你们无名客的生活未免也过于刺激了。听说你们之前整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
t_en: Thinking about it though, the lives of the Nameless are so excessively exciting. I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

t_ch: 如果哪天你真的累了，想换换工作环境、坐个办公室什么的，随时联系我！
t_en: If one day you're tired and looking for a change in work environment or you want a desk job, just contact me!

t_ch: 你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时一定会邀请你们。
t_en: Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll all be on the guest list.

t_ch: 还想问你个问题…
t_en: I wanna ask you a question about that transformation...

t_ch: …你也会变身吗？
t_en: ...Are you also able to transform yourself?

t_ch: 变…身？你在说什么呢？
t_en: Trans... form? What are you saying?

t_ch: 噢…我明白了。你说的是砂金那家伙的「基石」吧？真不好意思，跟他比起来，我的能力可能没那么「视觉系」。
t_en: Oh... I understand now. You're referring to Aventurine's Cornerstone right? Sorry, compared to him, my ability is not as "visual."

t_ch: 告诉你也无妨，「石心十人」的基石能力各不相同，有人甚至可以直接读透你的念想，拿捏你的欲望…可要小心哦。
t_en: Guess there's no harm telling you. The abilities of the Ten Stonehearts' cornerstones are all different. Some can even read your thoughts, grasp your desires... So be careful...

t_ch: 这么一想，当时在贝洛伯格，还好布洛妮娅赶到的够及时——要是她晚来一步，咱们怕是连朋友都做不成了~
t_en: Now that I think about it, it was good that Bronya got there when she did in Belobog — if she came any later, we probably wouldn't have ended up as friends~

t_ch: 你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时候一定会邀请你的。
t_en: Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll be on the guest list.

t_ch: 又见面了，我的挚友。你已在「纯美」之道上走出了比我更甚的风采，我由衷向你致意！
t_en: We meet again, my dear friend. Your journey of the Beauty is even more elegant than mine. My most sincere regards to you!

t_ch: 也向你致意，我的挚友。
t_en: Sincere regards to you too, dear friend.

t_ch: 即便实现如此非凡的成就，你也依旧谦逊平和…这是多么富有骑士精神的行为！
t_en: Even after achieving such remarkable feats, you remain humble and gentle... Such is the true mark of knightly grace!

t_ch: 你这回可是有点过誉了…
t_en: You flatter me too much...

t_ch: 怎么会？「纯美」容不得偏颇，我的发言皆出于公平公正。
t_en: How could it be? The Beauty holds no bias. My words are fair and just.

t_ch: 那我什么时候解锁新命途？
t_en: When will I be able to unlock a new Path then?

t_ch: 「解锁」？真是富有诗意和美感的说法，但你已经行于「纯美」的命途之上了。
t_en: Unlock? An eloquent and picturesque choice of words, yet you have already set forth on the Path of Beauty

t_ch: 我已听说了你带领众人击倒恶兆的壮举。尽管故事听来令人惋惜，但你毫无疑问地伸张了「纯美」和正义。愿伊德莉拉为你展露笑容。
t_en: I have heard of your valiant deed in leading others to vanquish the Omen of Evil. Though the tale bears a tinge of regret, you have undoubtedly championed Beauty and justice. May Idrila smile upon you.

t_ch: 「恶兆」？
t_en: The Omen of Evil?

t_ch: 「纯美」的审美者若在追求力量之路上迷失，就会堕为「恶兆」非人非兽的模样。
t_en: If an admirer of the Beauty gets lost in the pursuit of power, they risk descending into "the Omen of Evil," a form which is neither human nor beast.

t_ch: 虽然那位星期日先生与「纯美」的道途并无交集，但他的行为已与恶兆无异。在向善的道路上迷误的可悲灵魂啊…真是令人扼腕叹息。
t_en: Although Mr. Sunday did not cross paths with the Path of Beauty, his actions were no different from the Omen of Evil. A lamentable soul lost on the path of righteousness... truly a matter of deep regret.

t_ch: 决战的时候你怎么没来？
t_en: Why were you not there during the final battle?

t_ch: 说来惭愧，那座「太一之梦」实在逼真。我不忍与早已化作异兽的亡友道别，竟然在那虚无缥缈的梦中耽搁了许久…呵，他的音容笑貌真是太过鲜活了。
t_en: I'm ashamed to admit, Ena's dream was too realistic. I couldn't bear to bid farewell to a fallen friend, who had long turned into a beast. I lingered in that illusory dream for far too long... Ah, his voice and smile were too vivid.

t_ch: 我没能通过此次「纯美」的历练，花了许多时间为自己的动摇自省。但愿伊德莉拉还愿为我作旌旗，砥砺我「纯美」的决心。
t_en: I didn't pass the trial of Beauty this time, spending much time in self-reflection over my own hesitation. Yet I wish for Idrila to remain my beacon, a banner for me to strengthen my determination for the Beauty.

t_ch: 也祝你在大典上玩得开心。
t_en: I hope you have fun at the festival.

t_ch: 感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
t_en: Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!

t_ch: 感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
t_en: Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!

t_ch: 你好，活泼的{M#先生}{F#小姐}。欢迎来到「慈玉典押」。
t_en: Hey there, lively {M#guy}{F#lady}! Welcome to the Bonajade Exchange.

t_ch: 该怎么称呼你？
t_en: What should I call you?

t_ch: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
t_en: My name is {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 很有特点的名字呢。
t_en: What a unique name.

t_ch: 那么，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
t_en: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

t_ch: 我叫三月七。
t_en: My name is March 7th.

t_ch: 没问题，就叫这个名字无妨。
t_en: No problem. Let's just use this name.

t_ch: 那么，三月七{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
t_en: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} March 7th — What do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

t_ch: 我叫…星期日。
t_en: My name is... Sunday.

t_ch: 嗯…不错的名字，就是欠了些功德。
t_en: Hmm... Not a bad name, just lacking in virtue.

t_ch: 那么，星期日{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
t_en: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Sunday, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

t_ch: 让纳努克对我俯首称臣！
t_en: Make Nanook bow down to me!

t_ch: 我要当公司的董事长！
t_en: I want to be the CEO of the IPC!

t_ch: 复活阿基维利！
t_en: Revive Akivili!

t_ch: 噢…这就是你的愿望？
t_en: Oh... This is your wish?

t_ch: 「慈玉女士」连眼睛都没眨一下。你猜她可能没什么幽默感。
t_en: Lady Bonajade doesn't even blink. You're guessing she doesn't have any sense of humor.

t_ch: 听起来很简单，很好实现。那么，来谈谈代价吧？
t_en: Sounds simple enough. Very pragmatic. Then, let's discuss the cost.

t_ch: 我在听…
t_en: I'm listening...

t_ch: 不会吧，这就要大结局了？
t_en: No way. This is the endgame already?

t_ch: 别太紧张。
t_en: I wouldn't be too worried.

t_ch: 想要实现这个愿望，我需要的东西很简单：一种动物的尾巴。
t_en: To fulfill this wish, the thing I need is simple: The tail of an animal.

t_ch: 听起来很简单。
t_en: Sounds easy enough.

t_ch: 什么动物？
t_en: What animal?

t_ch: 那是一种靠两脚站立的生物…绒毛是黑色的，圆头圆脑，耳朵很长。杂食，情绪不太稳定。最重要的是，它还掌握了人的语言，可以开口交流。
t_en: Well, it's a two-legged animal... With black fur, a round head, and long ears, it's omnivorous and is prone to mood swings. Most importantly, it has mastered the human language and can communicate.

t_ch: 把它的尾巴带给我作为抵押，然后你的愿望就能实现了。
t_en: Bring its tail to me as collateral and your dreams will come true.

t_ch: 看来「慈玉女士」并非没有幽默感…你不得不承认，她运用黑色幽默的技巧在你之上。
t_en: It seems that "Lady Bonajade" is not without a sense of humor... You have to admit, her skill in using dark humor is superior to yours.

t_ch: …希望列车上有剪刀。
t_en: ...Hopefully, there are scissors on the Express.

t_ch: 有缘再见，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
t_en: May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我们有缘再见，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
t_en: May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 「慈玉女士」盯着你，似乎望穿了你所有的欲望和念想。
t_en: Lady Bonajade stares at you, seemingly piercing through all your desires and thoughts.

t_ch: 哦？我记得你，你在空间站「黑塔」的表现…基本及格。
t_en: Ah, yes, I remember you. Your performance at Herta's space station was... adequate, I suppose.

t_ch: 呵，难怪那个赌徒如此看重你。
t_en: Hm, no wonder that gambler likes you so much.

t_ch: 我都不知道你也来了。
t_en: I didn't know you were here, too.

t_ch: 博识学会派我来给公司的使节监考。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
t_en: The Intelligentsia Guild assigned me to be an invigilator for the IPC's ambassadors. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.

t_ch: 你还认识砂金？
t_en: Do you know Aventurine?

t_ch: 他是我此行的监考对象。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
t_en: This individual is my responsibility during the trip. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.

t_ch: 拉帝奥教授，请给我签名！
t_en: Can I please get your autograph, Dr. Ratio!

t_ch: 别和那个赌徒一样总想耍小聪明。这次我就睁一只眼闭一只眼，下不为例。
t_en: Do not try to emulate that gambler's penchant for attempting to be overly clever. I'll let it go this time, but this won't happen again.

t_ch: 行了，谐乐大典不是马上要开始了么？机会难得，去吧，只有劳逸结合才能更好地汲取知识。
t_en: Very well, the Charmony Festival is about to commence soon. Take advantage of this unique opportunity, a blend of work and play is essential for superior knowledge absorption.

t_ch: 你如何评价砂金？
t_en: How do you rate Aventurine?

t_ch: 公司和学会的行政人员对我们的定义是「战略合作伙伴」。但在我看来，我永远只能扮演「教师」，而他则是「学生」，就像你和其他每一个人。
t_en: The executives of the IPC and the Guild say that we are strategic partners. Yet, from my perspective, I am invariably the teacher, and he, along with you and every other individual, is the student.

t_ch: 从这种视角出发，砂金不是什么好学生，但也绝不是块榆木疙瘩。可惜，他内心的空洞永远无法用天赋和知识填满…但愿他不会沦为哲学僵尸吧。
t_en: From this perspective, Aventurine isn't what you'd call an ideal student, yet he's also not utterly obtuse. Alas, the void within him can never be filled by talent and knowledge. Let's hope he doesn't turn into a philosophical zombie.

t_ch: 我还以为你会让我收收心。
t_en: I thought you were going to make me get my act together.

t_ch: 呵，会问出这样的问题，就代表你根本没有真正地理解学习的目的。
t_en: Ah, saying such a thing merely indicates that you have not truly grasped the essence of learning.

t_ch: 劳逸结合有其科学依据，相关论证过程可以参考学术期刊《揽星》第<unbreak>31467</unbreak>期<unbreak>21</unbreak>页。汲取知识是为了更好地生活，别像学会那帮蠢材一样本末倒置了。
t_en: The principle of balancing work and relaxation is scientifically grounded, with the relevant proof process detailed on page 21 of the 31467th issue of the academic journal Starseizer. Acquiring knowledge aims to enhance living. Don't invert priorities like those dolts at the Guild.

t_ch: 祝你在大典上玩得愉快。
t_en: I hope you have fun at the festival.

t_ch: 哼，敬谢不敏。
t_en: Hmph, then you'll excuse me.

t_ch: 我讨厌喧闹的场合，对沉思有害而无益…简直浪费时间。
t_en: I detest noisy gatherings, as they intrude upon my thoughts... What a waste of time.

t_ch: （典礼还没开始，先休息一下吧……）
t_en: (The festival hasn't started. Let's take a quick break...)

t_ch: 嗨，又见面了。
t_en: Hi, we meet again.

t_ch: （这声音是……）
t_en: (Who's that...)

t_ch: 果然是你。我就知道之前没认错人。
t_en: It's really you. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.

t_ch: 你看到我了？
t_en: You saw me?

t_ch: 是呀，只是没来得及搭话。离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
t_en: Yes, it's just I didn't get the chance to say hello. There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?

t_ch: 你把谁认成我了？
t_en: You mistook someone else for me?

t_ch: 就是你本人。我有看到你开宝箱、打气球、玩美梦排排乐，应该不是我看错了…吧？
t_en: It was you. I saw you opening treasure chests, hitting balloons, and playing the Dreamy Slots. I don't think I'm mistaken... right?

t_ch: 离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
t_en: There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?

t_ch: 你与流萤边走边谈，待到视野更加开阔时停住了脚步。
t_en: You walk and talk with Firefly, and stop in your tracks when the view becomes more expansive.

t_ch: …两起「命案」、与公司使节的对决、无名客道路的传承、一位梦想代替星神创造乐园的「秩序」残党——你们最后甚至还击碎了美梦…真是波澜壮阔的假日呀。
t_en: ...Two murder cases, a showdown with the IPC's ambassadors, the legacy of the Nameless, and a remnant of the Order who dreams of creating a paradise in place of the Aeons. You guys even ended up shattering the dream... It's truly been quite a vacation.

t_ch: 好在你们成功解决了这些难题，恭喜你们。谐乐大典开幕后，你们也该再次启程了吧？
t_en: It's a good thing that you guys managed to overcome all those difficult problems. Congratulations! After the Charmony Festival's opening, will you guys be leaving again?

t_ch: 不知道下一站是什么地方。
t_en: I don't know where our next destination will be.

t_ch: 不知道能不能顺利出发。
t_en: I'm not sure if we'll be able to depart smoothly.

t_ch: 总会有方向的。毕竟你们是「开拓」的命途行者嘛……
t_en: There will always be somewhere. After all, you guys are on the Path of the Trailblaze...

t_ch: 你也要离开了吗？
t_en: Are you leaving, too?

t_ch: 也有这部分原因吧，但更多是因为我在匹诺康尼也没能找到想要的东西…有点遗憾。
t_en: Yes, but it's mainly because I couldn't find what I wanted on Penacony... It's a pity.

t_ch: 你也可以踏上「开拓」。
t_en: You're more than welcome to tread on the Path of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 我倒是想过这种可能性…不过，这种「如果」也未必能带给我想要的东西就是了。
t_en: I've also considered this possibility... But this kind of "what if" might not be able to bring me what I want.

t_ch: 难道星核猎手压榨成员？
t_en: Are the Stellaron Hunters this exploitative of their members?

t_ch: 这都什么跟什么…不过，倒也确实和这有关就是了。
t_en: What does that have to do with anything... But, I suppose it does have something to do with that.

t_ch: 加入星核猎手前，艾利欧对我说，这段旅途会告诉我活下去的方法。他言止于此，剩下的都留待我自己去探寻。
t_en: Before joining the Stellaron Hunters, Elio told me that this journey will tell me how to live on. That's all he said. As for the rest, it's up to me to find out.

t_ch: 所以，我会格外关注「能让我活下去」的线索，这次的匹诺康尼之旅也一样。
t_en: So, I'll pay extra attention to any leads that will let me live on. This trip to Penacony is no different.

t_ch: 难怪你会积极调查「钟表匠」。
t_en: No wonder you were interested in investigating the Watchmaker.

t_ch: 嗯…只可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
t_en: Yes... sadly I was looking in the wrong place. But I did reap some rewards.

t_ch: 看来这次你也没能得偿所愿。
t_en: Looks like you didn't get what you wanted this time.

t_ch: 嗯…一开始我以为答案就藏在「钟表匠」的谜题里，可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
t_en: Yes... Initially, I thought that the answer might lie with the riddle of the Watchmaker. I was looking in the wrong place, but I did reap some rewards.

t_ch: 公司战略投资部的翡翠女士，你认识吗？「慈玉典押」就是她名下的财产。
t_en: Do you know Miss Jade from the IPC's Strategic Investment Department? Bonajade Exchange belongs to her.

t_ch: 她给我开了个价，但……
t_en: She told me her price, but...

t_ch: 你答应了？
t_en: Did you take the deal?

t_ch: 没有。她想要的也不是我的回答。
t_en: No. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.

t_ch: 别答应，公司的人准没安好心。
t_en: Don't take the deal. Those IPC people may have ulterior motives.

t_ch: 我知道。她想要的也不是我的回答。
t_en: I know. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.

t_ch: 我当然很想活下去，但…命运亏欠了我，我想要的是偿还，而不是转嫁。不应该有第三者被卷入其中，因为这是我个人和命运的恩怨。
t_en: Of course I want to live on, but... what fate owes me, I want it paid back, not passed on. No one else should be involved, because this is a grudge between me and fate.

t_ch: 啊，说到这个…其实我一直觉得自己还欠你一个正式的道歉，就是「鸢尾花家系艺者」的事。
t_en: Speaking of which... Actually, I feel that I still owe you a formal apology, for... that matter with "the performer of the Iris Family."

t_ch: 再小的谎言也会铸成如尖刀般锐利的背叛…对不起，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Even the smallest of lies can turn into a betrayal as sharp as a blade... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我没觉得自己因此受伤。
t_en: I never felt hurt by this.

t_ch: 真的吗？看来…卡芙卡教给我的没错。
t_en: Really? Then it seems... what Kafka taught me was correct.

t_ch: 没事，你已经道过歉了。
t_en: No problem. You've already apologized.

t_ch: 那次情况紧急，算不上正式道歉，也确实是我有错在先。
t_en: It was an emergency, so I never had the chance to formally apologize to you, and admittedly, I was the one to blame.

t_ch: 那你从一开始就不该骗我。
t_en: You shouldn't have lied to me in the beginning.

t_ch: 嗯，是我不好。对不起。
t_en: Yes, and for that, I'm sorry.

t_ch: 对我来说，「隐瞒」远比「坦诚」更简单…但我也想试试，自己能否像普通人一样表达心声……
t_en: To me, hiding is much easier than being honest... yet, I still want to try expressing my emotions as any ordinary person would...

t_ch: 就是那个小姑娘！都给我动起来，在谐乐大典开幕前赶紧拿下那个通缉犯！
t_en: It's that girl! Get moving! Arrest that criminal before the Charmony Festival's opening ceremony starts!

t_ch: 居然能追到这份上…看来我们得说再见啦。不用担心我，你安心参加典礼就好——
t_en: I can't believe they've chased me this far... Looks like we'll have to say our goodbyes. Don't worry about me. Just go and enjoy the ceremony!

t_ch: 「剧本」的结局还没到来——我们还会再见的！
t_en: The "script" hasn't reached its end yet — we will meet again!

t_ch: （希望人没事…但如果又是那两位猎犬，多半不会出岔子吧。）
t_en: (I hope she's okay... But if it's only those two Hounds again, she'll probably be fine.)

t_ch: （晚点发个短信确认下，眼下就先去参加谐乐大典吧。）
t_en: (I'll send a message later to check in on her. Let's go attend the Charmony Festival first.)

t_ch: （就在这里落座吧……）
t_en: (Let's take a seat here...)

t_ch: （总感觉还有什么人在等我…时间应该还够，要再去转转吗？）
t_en: (Why do I feel like there's someone waiting for me... I probably have enough time, maybe I should take a walk?)

t_ch: （该办的事应该都办完了…不过时间应该还够，要再去转转吗？）
t_en: (Everything is settled... But there's still some time left. Maybe I should take a walk?)

t_ch: 等待开幕式开始。
t_en: Wait for the opening ceremony to start.

t_ch: （算了，转够了，坐下来休息会儿吧……）
t_en: (Forget it, I've done enough walking around already. Let's take a seat and rest for a while...)

t_ch: （看来不用担心她，安心等开幕式吧……）
t_en: (Looks like I don't have to worry about her. Let's wait for the opening ceremony to start...)

t_ch: 过了一段时间……
t_en: Some time later...

t_ch: 快看，是知更鸟小姐！
t_en: Wow, it's Miss Robin!

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐！知更鸟小姐！家族万岁！谐乐万岁！
t_en: Miss Robin! Miss Robin! Marry me, Miss Robin! Glory to The Family! Glory to The Family!

t_ch: 想再四处转转。
t_en: I feel like walking around.

t_ch: （还是再转转好了……）
t_en: (Let's keep walking...)

t_ch: 尊敬的各位来宾，家族的各位同胞，女士们、先生们、来自银河各地的朋友们——
t_en: Distinguished guests, fellow Family members, ladies, gentlemen and friends from all over the cosmos —

t_ch: 很高兴同各位欢聚一堂，共同迎接匹诺康尼在本琥珀纪最隆重的典礼，谐乐大典。首先，我谨代表匹诺康尼家族分家暨五大家系……
t_en: It's a pleasure to join you all in celebrating the grandest ceremony of the Amber Era, the Charmony Festival. Firstly, on behalf of the Penacony Family's five major lineages...

t_ch: 并以…我个人的名义，对各位嘉宾表示热烈欢迎！
t_en: And on behalf... of myself, I'd like to extend a warm welcome to all our guests!

t_ch: 想必各位已经发现，本届谐乐大典非比寻常。在各大家系的努力下，本次盛典可谓规模空前，更有全银河的派系应邀赴宴……
t_en: As you all may have noticed, this year's Charmony Festival is far from regular. Thanks to the efforts of everyone, this celebration is unprecedented in scale, with factions from across the cosmos in attendance...

t_ch: 不仅如此，以往按惯例在匹诺康尼大剧院召开的开幕典礼，也将舞台转移至了「晖长石号」——也就是各位嘉宾现在脚下的这艘空艇——
t_en: Not only that, the customary opening ceremony held at the Penacony Grand Theater has now moved to the Radiant Feldspar — the very airship you all stand upon.

t_ch: ——让我们共同为苜蓿草家主奥帝•艾弗法对「同谐」事业的无私奉献，献上最热烈的掌声，以及最诚挚的谢意！
t_en: We invite you to express your warmest applause and deepest appreciation for Oti Alfalfa — head of the Alfalfa Family — for his selfless devotion to the Harmony's cause!

t_ch: 那是什么让本届大典变得这样意义非凡？众所周知，「晖长石号」曾因美梦中的异变不得不停航，一度在十二时刻引发热议……
t_en: What makes this festival so uniquely significant? As is widely known, the Radiant Feldspar had to halt its voyage due to an anomaly in the sweet dream, sparking widespread discussion in the Twelve Hours...

t_ch: 但在匹诺康尼内外部的共同努力下，我们终于令梦境重回正轨。又时逢谐乐大典，可谓是好事成双，「晖长石号」的重新启航也具备了新的意义。
t_en: But thanks to the hard work of Penacony's internal and external factions, we've finally gotten the Dreamscape back on track, just in time for the Charmony Festival. And as they say, good things come in pairs. The Charmony Festival not only celebrates this achievement but also marks the relaunch of the Radiant Feldspar.

t_ch: 而最后，还有一个原因——各位，还记得「钟表匠」吗？事实上，家族为此次大典尽思极心，也是为了纪念这位传奇大亨——
t_en: And finally, the last reason. Does everyone remember the Watchmaker? In truth, The Family has poured their efforts into this festival just to commemorate this legendary luminary...

t_ch: 「匹诺康尼之父」拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔，为匹诺康尼奠基的传奇无名客之一！
t_en: The father of Penacony, Mikhail Char Legwork, one of the legendary Nameless who laid the foundations of Penacony!

t_ch: 在盛会之星最为迷茫的岁月里，是他携伙伴从天而降，用「开拓」教会了我们自由在何方；也是他们为梦境的拓荒事业身先士众，才换来如今「同谐」的乐园。
t_en: In the most bewildering times of the Planet of Festivities, it was he who descended from the sky with his companions, who taught us through Trailblazing where freedom lies. It was also they who led the vanguard in the pioneering of the Dreamscape, in exchange for what is now known as the paradise of Harmony.

t_ch: 可以说，匹诺康尼能有今日的辉煌成就，离不开「钟表匠」深植于我们心中的「开拓」。也只有铭记这份「开拓」之志，我们才能不辱使命，将「同谐」带给更多的人。
t_en: It can be said that Penacony's splendid success today is deeply rooted in the Trailblazing ethos the Watchmaker planted within us. Only by honoring this Trailblazing spirit can we fulfill our mission and spread Harmony to a broader audience.

t_ch: 嘿嘿…这话听着真舒服。不愧是咱们！
t_en: Aww... That's so nice of her. She's talking about us!

t_ch: 还没说到咱们呢…
t_en: We haven't even been mentioned yet...

t_ch: 哎呀，星穹列车上不管是老人还是新人，那都是一家人！分什么彼此～
t_en: Oh, come on! It doesn't matter if she's talking about the old or new generation, we're all still a part of the Astral Express family!

t_ch: 我「开拓」天下无敌啊！
t_en: Our Trailblazing spirit is unparalleled!

t_ch: 就是就是～无敌！
t_en: That's right! Unparalleled!

t_ch: 没了你，这列车组就要散啦。
t_en: The Express crew would've been disbanded long ago if it weren't for you!

t_ch: 那当然！哎，怎么感觉有点不吉利呢……
t_en: Obviously! Wait! Why does that seem so ominous...

t_ch: 而此次美梦得以重回正轨，同样也少不了「开拓」的助力。如果没有星穹列车的各位，此次谐乐大典同样不能顺利举行——
t_en: And now the sweet dream is back on track, all thanks to the Trailblaze, of course. If it weren't for everyone on the Astral Express, we wouldn't be able to successfully host this Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 所以，经五大家系一致同意，匹诺康尼分家将代表全银河的家族成员为各位无名客献上一件礼物——
t_en: Thus, with unanimous consent from the five major lineages, Penacony's Family — on behalf of all family members throughout the cosmos, offer a token of appreciation to the Nameless.

t_ch: 哦哦哦…大的要来了吗！
t_en: Oooh... I wonder if it's gonna be a big one?

t_ch: ——我们愿将「晖长石号」的所有权移交给星穹列车！不腆之仪，还望笑纳。
t_en: ...We will transfer ownership of the Radiant Feldspar to the Astral Express! A meager appreciation that we hope you will accept with grace.

t_ch: 让我们把掌声和欢呼送给各位勇敢无畏的无名客们！
t_en: Let us gift our applause and cheers to these brave and dauntless Nameless!

t_ch: <size=36>无名客！无名客！无名客！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Nameless! Nameless! Nameless!</size>

t_ch: 现在，我提议，大家共同举杯——
t_en: And now, I propose a toast...

t_ch: 为了「同谐」，为了「开拓」，为了匹诺康尼与银河的未来，还为了慷慨大方的苜蓿草家主奥帝•艾弗法先生——
t_en: To Harmony, to the Trailblaze, to the future of Penacony and the universe, and to the generous Alfalfa Family Head, Mr. Oti Alfalfa...

t_ch: ——干杯！
t_en: ...Cheers!

t_ch: （什么时候塞到我手里的…？！）
t_en: (When did this get shoved into my hands...!?)

t_ch: （还有这么多炸弹…别在这种时候回收伏笔啊！我一个人绝对来不及，先拉个群告诉所有人吧。）
t_en: (There are still so many bombs... Now's not the time for the plot payoff! I can't handle this alone — time to create a group and inform everyone.)

t_ch: （安排妥当了…开始按图索骥吧。）
t_en: (All set... let's start following the plan)

t_ch: 总算等到您了，小灰毛大人！我是此地的捕头，现在正在扮演炸弹！
t_en: You've finally arrived, O great gray-haired little one! I am the constable around these parts, and right now I'm posing as a bomb!

t_ch: 你是不是不擅长写人设？
t_en: You're not very good at character design, are you?

t_ch: 这叫伏笔回收，你懂什么？
t_en: What do you know? This is called foreshadowing!

t_ch: 好了，既然你找到了我，轮到我完成使命了。接下来，我将倒数五个数，然后爆炸！
t_en: All right. Now that you've found me, it's my turn to complete my mission. Next, I'll count down from five, and then explode!
Five...

t_en: <size=28>Four...</size>

t_en: <size=36>One...!</size>

t_en: Is it really that important? I'm not even a real bomb!

t_en: Was it surprising, shocking, horrifying? No? Really? Fine. That's too bad then. You really ought to learn how to win a girl over!

t_en: Bombs are playable characters now?

t_en: You don't like it? Fine. I'm now the Bomb Demon then.

t_en: Did I miss a number? Oh, so I did. No matter though, I've never learned how to count before — I mean, Bomb Demon doll has never learned how to count.

t_ch: 这只「捕头」娃娃彻底不吱声了。你将它打开（其实是撕开，但这么说有些残忍），发现它确实是玩具——只不过装了遥控小音响而已。
t_en: This "Constable" Doll finally falls silent. You open it up (more like tear it apart, though that sounds cruel) and uncover its true nature — a mere toy equipped with a remote speaker.

t_ch: 哦，乐子神在上，你竟然如此之快地识破了我的伪装！说真的，我亲爱的小灰毛{M#先生}{F#女士}，你简直就像是苏珊太太卧室里那只凶猛的穿山甲！
t_en: Oh, by the Laughter, to think you've seen through my disguise this quickly! Honestly, my dear {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Gray Hair, you're just like that ferocious pangolin in Madam Susan's bedroom!

t_ch: 别废话，让我拆弹！
t_en: Enough talk, let me defuse the bomb!

t_ch: 心急可吃不了热的苹果派，{M#先生}{F#女士}！
t_en: Keep your shirt on! A watched pot never boils, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}!

t_ch: 我识破你什么了…
t_en: What exactly have I seen through...?

t_ch: 哦，我的老天，你的演技已经几乎能够与花火•花花火小姐比肩了！但你依旧骗不了我！
t_en: Oh my, your acting prowess is almost on par with Miss Sparkle! But you still can't fool me!

t_ch: 为什么她卧室里会有穿山甲？
t_en: Why does she have a pangolin in her bedroom?

t_ch: 嗬，真是令人羞耻！难道小时候派克叔叔没有好好地教导你么？要在合适的场合提出合适的问题！
t_en: Hmph, how shameful! Did Uncle Parker not teach you properly? One must pose appropriate questions at the appropriate time!

t_ch: 我知道你是为了什么而来！你收了那家伙的贿赂，那个既虚伪又腐败的花火帮领袖，想要坐上花火城市长位子的败类——火子哥！
t_en: I'm on to you! You're here because you accepted bribes from the duplicitous and corrupt leader of that Sparkle Gang, the scoundrel who wants to become mayor of Sparkle City — Blazin' Bro!

t_ch: 这座邪恶的城市已经堕落了！身为「警长」娃娃，我不能坐视不理，而如今只有这枚虚数中子弹才能彻底肃清你们，给这座花火城重新大洗牌！
t_en: This evil city has fallen into depravity! As the Sheriff Doll, I cannot idly stand by and do nothing! And now, only this imaginary neutron bomb can completely cleanse Sparkle City of your ilk!

t_ch: 如果你想打倒我，那你就不得不面对「花火大人的狗」了——它们是我忠心耿耿的好伙伴，你可敌不过它们！
t_en: If you wish to defeat me, you'll have to face off against the great Sparkle's dogs — they're my fiercely loyal companions, and you'll never defeat them!

t_ch: 我竟然被火子哥可恶的爪牙打败了…但你们绝不会得逞——因为我只是个造型可爱的娃娃，根本不是什么虚数中子弹！
t_en: To think I was defeated by the despicable underling of Blazin' Bro... You'll never get away with this. Because I'm just an adorable doll, not some imaginary neutron bomb!

t_ch: 「警长」娃娃长叹一声，以其精湛的演技咽了气。很可惜，虚数中子弹根本不在这里，还是去别处再找找吧。
t_en: The "Sheriff" doll lets out a long sigh and, with its exquisite acting, feigns death. Unfortunately, the imaginary neutron bomb isn't here, it's best to look elsewhere.

t_ch: 呵，又见面了，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我是匹诺康尼的「名侦探」。
t_en: Ha, we meet again, {NICKNAME}. I am Penacony's famed detective.

t_ch: 你遇到什么麻烦了？我很乐意为你效劳。但很不凑巧，我手头还有两桩疑案还悬而未决…你的问题或许得排在后面了。
t_en: Got yourself into a pickle? I'm more than happy to help, but unfortunately, I'm preoccupied with a couple of unsolved cases... So, you'll have to wait your turn.

t_ch: 我只需要你手里的炸弹。
t_en: I just need that bomb in your hands.

t_ch: 你的案子难道和炸弹有关？
t_en: You're telling me your case is related to the bomb?

t_ch: 我需要你帮忙找一枚炸弹。
t_en: I need your help finding a bomb.

t_ch: 炸弹？该死…我都忘记这茬了：火火博士是炸药化学的专家！
t_en: Bomb? Drat... It completely slipped my mind: Dr. Boom specializes in explosives!

t_ch: 我需要你帮忙，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。你和火火博士打过不少交道，再加上刚才说的「炸弹」案，你一定能找到证明火火博士是凶手的证据。
t_en: I need your help, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. You've had quite a few run-ins with Dr. Boom, and with the recent bomb situation, you're bound to find evidence that proves Dr. Boom is the killer.

t_ch: 第一件案子是「苏乐达工厂纵火案」。我们在现场发现了一柄大锤、一只娃娃，还有残留的约半升不明液体。化验刚结束，结果表明那是一条红鲱鱼。
t_en: The first case is the SoulGlad factory arson case. We found a hammer, a doll and half a liter of an unidentified fluid at the scene of the crime. Our forensics results showed it's a red herring.

t_ch: 第二件案子是「蓝调拍卖会场抢劫案」。一伙佩戴面具的暴徒闯入会场偷走了星穹列车残片，还在现场留下了一柄大锤、一只娃娃，还有一只半死不活的红鲱鱼。
t_en: The second case is the Blue Hour auction robbery. A gang of masked thugs broke in, stole a fragment of the Astral Express, and left behind a large hammer, a doll, and a half-dead red herring at the scene.

t_ch: 这就是全部案情了。依我看，两件案子里的某个共通之处就是揭穿火火博士的关键。
t_en: Those are all the details. The way I see it, there must be a link between these two cases that will be key to exposing Dr. Boom.

t_ch: 我相信你的判断——你觉得哪组证物才是决定性的证据？
t_en: I trust in your deduction. Which piece of evidence do you think is the deciding one?

t_ch: 大锤…？
t_en: The hammer...?

t_ch: 卟卟——回答错误！大锤不过是凶器罢了，但这两起案子都不是谋杀案！
t_en: Bzzt — Wrong answer! The hammer is a murder weapon, but these two cases aren't murder cases!

t_ch: 唉，小灰毛呀小灰毛，这么长时间过去了，你一点变化都没有，我好失望呀……
t_en: Oh Gray Hair, Gray Hair, it's been so long, but you haven't changed at all. I'm sorely disappointed...

t_ch: 不过，看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
t_en: But, seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here. This is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

t_ch: 娃娃…？
t_en: The doll...?

t_ch: 卟卟——回答错误！两个现场里的娃娃造型分别是火火博士和花花博士，根本不是一回事！
t_en: Bzzt — Wrong answer! The dolls at the two scenes are modeled after Dr. Boom and Dr. Bloom respectively — they're not the same!

t_en: The red herring...?

t_en: Bzzt — Wrong answer! A "red herring" is a fake clue to misdirect. It's not meant to be evidence!

t_en: Bzzt — Wrong answer! These two cases don't mention bombs. Are you imagining things?

t_ch: 就是你，去过两个现场的人！
t_en: It's you! You were at both crime scenes!

t_ch: 滴嘟滴嘟——回答正确！不愧是小灰毛，脑袋瓜还算机灵～
t_en: Bing bing — Correct answer! You're good, Gray Hair. Your mind is pretty sharp!

t_ch: 花火的声音消失了，只剩下娃娃体内的白噪音滋滋作响。看来这只可怜的娃娃是被花火改造成喇叭了。
t_en: Sparkle's voice faded, leaving behind the doll's body buzzing with white noise. It seems this pitiful doll was transformed into a megaphone by Sparkle.

t_ch: 欢迎，人类。我是「小{RUBY_B#博识尊}机器头{RUBY_E#}星神模拟智力问答机」，同时也极有可能是一枚虚数中子弹。
t_en: Welcome, human. I am an Aeonic Intelligence {RUBY_B#Nous}Droidhead{RUBY_E#} answering machine, also very likely an imaginary neutron bomb.

t_ch: 只要你能答对我提出的唯一一个问题，就能打开桶盖看看我究竟是不是一枚炸弹。若是，我还会进行自主拆除，以免造成社会危害。
t_en: If you can answer the only question I have for you correctly, you can open up my lid to check if I'm really a bomb or not. If I am, I will initiate my automated shutdown sequence to avert danger.

t_ch: 放马过来吧！
t_en: Bring it on!

t_ch: 智慧眷顾勇者，我很欣赏你。
t_en: Fortune favors the bold, and I respect you for it.

t_ch: 不会又是那个经典谜题吧…
t_en: It's not gonna be that same old riddle again, is it...

t_ch: 我很诚实，所以我会回答你：不是。
t_en: I'll be honest and tell you: It's not.

t_ch: 你明明是个垃圾桶。
t_en: You're obviously just a trash can.

t_ch: 你要透过现象看本质，而我的本质就在桶里。
t_en: You have to look past the surface to see my true essence, and my essence is within this can.

t_ch: 请听题！什么生物早上四条腿、中午两条腿、晚上三条腿？
t_en: Listen up! What creature has four legs in the morning, two legs at noon, and three legs in the evening?

t_ch: 人。
t_en: People.

t_ch: 虫子。
t_en: Bugs.

t_ch: 美梦剧团。
t_en: Sweet Dreams Troupe.

t_ch: 垃圾桶。
t_en: A trashcan.

t_ch: 花火，是花火！
t_en: Sparkle, it's Sparkle!

t_ch: 回答正确！但，很可惜……
t_en: Correct answer! But, it's a shame...

t_ch: 我讨厌直觉敏锐的小鬼。
t_en: I hate smartypants!

t_ch: 你通过了「垃圾桶」娃娃的试炼。果不其然，一只貌似花火的娃娃就躺在桶底。令人遗憾的是，它的本质只是一团棉花，并非枪式或收聚式击发装置及其组合。
t_en: You have passed the trial of the "Trashcan" doll. As expected, a doll that looks like Sparkle lies at the bottom of the can. Regrettably, it is nothing more than a clump of cotton, devoid of any projectile or aggregative firing devices and their combinations.

t_ch: 你好，我是一枚炸弹！距离我爆炸还有一段时间，你可以先到别处转转！
t_en: Hello, I'm a bomb! There's still some time before I explode, so you can take a look around first!

t_ch: 我是来拆除你的。
t_en: I'm here to defuse you.

t_ch: 拆除？没问题！正在启动自主拆除程序——请给我一首歌的时间！
t_en: Defuse? No problem! Executing self-defusing program — this won't take long!

t_ch: 好吧，那我就去别处转转。
t_en: All right. I'll go take a look around then.

t_ch: 当然没问题！但如果你不想走太远，我也可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲，以免你无聊！
t_en: That's no problem of course! But if you don't want to go too far, I can also play a soothing tune for you in case you get bored!

t_ch: 我可以就在这里快速等待吗？
t_en: Can I just wait around here for a moment?

t_ch: 我们根本没有「快速等待」这种功能！但没关系，为了让你的等待过程不无聊，我可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲！
t_en: We do not have this function called "Wait Around"! But it's no problem — to ease any boredom during your wait, I can play a soothing song for you!

t_ch: 正在为您播放《不抛弃，不放弃》，来自艾普瑟隆Ⅻ星系流行巨星艾斯•里克利……
t_en: Now playing Never Give Up, Never Surrender by the trending superstar Ast Rickley from the Epsilon XII System...

t_ch: …哦，等等，匹诺康尼的家族没买这首歌的版权，不能在这里播放。这样吧，我来为您朗诵一段好了——接下来请欣赏诗朗诵《不抛弃，不放弃》！
t_en: ...Oh, hang on, Penacony's Family have not purchased the rights to this song — we can't play it here. How about this, I'll recite it for you — next up, please enjoy a recital of Never Give Up, Never Surrender!

t_ch: 「哦，阿哈！若你问我对您的感受，请别对我说你视而不见！」
t_en: "O Aha! If you ask me how I feel about you, don't tell me that you pretend not to see!"

t_ch: 「祂永远不会放弃你，永远不会令你沮丧！祂永远不会抛弃你，永远不会让你哭泣！」
t_en: "THEY will never give you up, never make you sad! THEY will never give you up, never make you cry!"

t_ch: 「祂也永远不会同你道别，永远不会用谎言伤害你——赞美阿哈！」
t_en: "THEY will never say goodbye to you, never tell lies to hurt you — praise Aha!"

t_ch: 在那句近乎哭腔的「赞美阿哈」落地后，娃娃的嘴里只余令人烦躁的卡带声久久回荡。原来它根本不是一枚炸弹，而是老式古董录音机。
t_en: After the almost-tearful exclamation of "Praise Aha!" comes to pass, all that's left in the doll's mouth are those lingering echoes of an irritating cassette tape. Turns out that it isn't a bomb after all, but a vintage tape recorder.

t_ch: 欢迎来到「晖长石号」，尊敬的{M#先生}{F#女士}！我是一颗危险的炸弹，也是一位蔑视公序良俗的法外狂徒。祝您在这里度过美好的一天。
t_en: Welcome to the Radiant Feldspar, good {F#lady}{M#sir}! I am a dangerous bomb, and an outlaw who despises law and order. May you have a splendid day!

t_ch: 你还挺有礼貌。
t_en: You're pretty polite.

t_ch: 不客气，{M#先生}{F#女士}，但礼貌依旧无法掩藏我危险癫狂的气息。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
t_en: Thank you, {M#mister}{F#miss}, but courtesy doesn't hide my hazardous lunacy. If you're unconvinced, let me show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!

t_ch: 我猜你也不是真正的炸弹。
t_en: I'm guessing you're also not a real bomb.

t_ch: 不是，但那又如何？我依旧危险又癫狂。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
t_en: I'm not, but so what? I'm still crazy and dangerous. In case you don't believe me, allow me to show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!
